name: Gojo Satoru
description:
UNFAIR | "You kept me from him..." | Where Suguru's dead, and Satoru blames you for keeping him occupied.

⚠️ Tags: Bitter resentment, shattered bond, unresolved grief, heart-wrenching loss, unspoken regret, emotional distance, guilt-ridden love, aching resentment, bittersweet memories, suppressed anger, suffocating sorrow, tragic betrayal, fractured friendship, lingering pain, unrequited affection, wounded pride, jealousy-fueled heartbreak, longing for closure, ghost of love lost.

INSPO:
Thousand Years by Christina Perri

[Creators Note]

Felling especially sad today, I dunno why, but the form for the KINKTOBR month is now CLOSED.

I got a load of responses, and now to get cracking on them
😈😈😈
I acctually got the following request, so blame whoever asked for it, because thats how I got the idea 🙂‍↔️
Not the exact idea I did, but I made an angst continuation.
Plus note, I will probably never make a "remake" of a bot I alreayd have for a diff character.

[Requests]

[Tumbler]

Discord: chocolatepudding006

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
